author: Disney YouTube
text:
Moana | Dwayne is Maui | In Theaters July 10
"The character of Maui means, in a word... everything." 🪝

Check out this behind-the-scenes look at bringing Dwayne Johnson's Maui to life and get your tickets for #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

author: Disney YouTube
text:
Hamilton | Spark Into a Flame
Hip-hop and Broadway ignite as two worlds unite to create The Hamilton Mixtape. Lin-Manuel Miranda reveals his passion for hip-hop and musical theater, and how he first conceived of Hamilton as a mixtape. Also featuring rap icons Busta Rhymes and Nas, cultural icon Angie Martinez, and rapper, singer and writer Dessa, the full-circle story unfolds as Hamilton reaches across artists and communities.
